content.en:
Xuanxu Holy Realm.

A starry continent.

There are only a few human beings on this starry sky continent, after all, the Xuanxu Saint Realm is too big, there are countless starry sky continents, there are too many territories, and no matter how many people there are, they can't completely spread the population all over every starry sky continent.

At this time, a dark area was born on this starry sky continent.

This dark area is actually composed of countless black lights, and because it is so weird, all the humans on this starry sky continent have withdrawn, for fear that something will go wrong.

Moreover, even if they didn't retreat, in case the Domain Ancestors explored this area and found any treasures, once they fought, the fluctuations alone would be enough to annihilate them.

Therefore, the humans on this starry sky continent did not dare to stay.

They had no way to enter the dark area, so they had to retreat honestly.

Soon, the half-step domain ancestor of the human race came.

But the half-step domain ancestor found that this area was not simple, and immediately reported it to the domain ancestor of the human race.

And the anomalies in this area also spread, attracting the attention of many domain ancestors.

As a result, some domain ancestors came here, and they had a guess for the first time.

Outside the Starry Sky Continent.

Some of the Domain Ancestors were speculating.

"This black light is a bit weird, my divine sense can't detect it, and even my Consummation Domain Technique-level pupil technique can't penetrate it!"

"I can't leak out at all, could it be that some holy relic was born?"

"It doesn't look like a holy relic, does it?"

"Don't you notice that this is a sign of some kind of holy relic?"

"Could it be the very special one of the holy relics?"

"That's right, it's that holy relic—the ancestral relic!"

Ancestral relics!

When many domain ancestors heard this, they couldn't believe it, but most of them were still very confused, so they hadn't heard of it.

Because the Zuwen relics are so rare, they are not included in the list of holy relics.

The reason why it is not included in the list of holy relics is because this holy relic is a consumable holy relic.

This sacred relic contains the ancestral script, which is a special kind of writing, and it is rumored that the ancestral script has something to do with the creation of the ancestral law, but it is only a little related.

There are many kinds of ancestral texts, but they only exist on ancestral relics, and cannot be recorded, and once inscribed on anything, they will disappear and will not be allowed by the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Through the ancestral text, everyone can comprehend the corresponding forbidden path, domain arts, holy techniques, etc., and even comprehend the creation of the ancestral law.

Of course, I have not heard of anyone who has come to the Ancestral Texts to create the Ancestral Method.

However, if there are enough ancestral relics, if you continue to enlighten them, you may really be able to increase the hope of creating the Ancestral Law.

The strength of the ancestral relics depends entirely on the number of ancestral texts.

For example, some Zuwen holy relics only have one or two ancestral texts, and that kind of ancestral relics are more rubbish, but some ancestral relics have thousands of ancestral texts, and the value of that ancestral text is very high.

In short, the Zuwen relics are helpful to all.

What's even more exciting is that once the Zuwen Holy Relic is born, it is difficult to take it away, it is almost frozen in the void, and it cannot be refined.

At the very least, they hadn't heard of anyone refining the Zuwen Holy Relic.

In the past, if the Dark Sanctuary gave birth to the Zuwen Relic, the major forces would compete for the territory of that area and thus control the Zuwen Relic.

But now, if there is really an ancestral holy relic here, will the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws start a war with all the domain ancestors?

Many Domain Ancestors thought that the Terran Race could not completely occupy this Ancestral Sacred Relic, so the strength of the Terran was too weak, and Ye Tian alone could not compete with all the Domain Ancestors.

Moreover, this time it is different from the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

The Soul Saint Realm Flower can only be refined by one person, thus being promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

However, the ancestral relics were enough for a large number of domain ancestors to participate in the cultivation process, and it was not realistic for the human race to occupy the ancestral relics here.

If Ye Tian can take away this ancestral holy relic, the other domain ancestors are afraid that they will be helpless, but the key is that they can't take it away now!

"I hope it's an ancestral relic, then it's a great opportunity for us!"

Many domain ancestors thought to themselves.

Ye Tian, who got the news, soon rushed here.

The domain ancestors of the human race greeted Ye Tian one after another and explained the situation here.

"Ancestral relics!"

Ye Tian didn't dare to confirm it, because he had never seen an ancestral holy relic.

If it was really an ancestral relic, then what should he do?

"No, the strength of the human race is too weak, and I can't suppress all the Supreme Domain Ancestors with my own strength, even if I mobilize the power of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, at most I have a Supreme Domain Ancestor comparable to the first grade, and I can't really go against the sky, once I completely anger those Domain Ancestors, if they wreak havoc in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, it will be a catastrophe for the human race!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he did not want to bet on the Terrans.

Besides, it's just an ancestral relic, but it's not as important as the human race.

In the future, the Xuanxu Saint Realm is afraid that more treasures and opportunities will be born, is it possible that he will always be the enemy of all the domain ancestors?

The Terrans are not Holy Gates, and they can't completely control a Holy Realm.

Unless he is willing to give up the Xuanxu Saint Realm to the Battle Gate now, and let the War Gate send a Superior Domain Ancestor to take charge, then he may be able to completely control the Xuanxu Saint Realm, so that no force can invade the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

But Ye Tian is not stupid, so naturally he will not do this.

As time passed, the black light slowly contracted, gradually taking on the phantom of a black bell.

At this time, the aura of the holy relic permeated.

"First of all, it's a holy thing!"

Many domain ancestors thought to themselves.

As for whether it is an ancestral relic, it depends on whether there is an ancestral relic.

More and more Domain Ancestors have come here, after all, the Ancestral Sacred Relics are too attractive, and they are of great use to all Domain Ancestors!

Hundreds of years have passed.

this day.

The black light finally dissipated, revealing the full picture of the bell-like holy relic.

Buzz Buzz !!!

The fluctuations of the holy relics spread out in an all-round way, and there were glittering words on the body of the bell.

These words are Zuwen!

"It's really a sacred relic of Zuwen!"

Many Domain Ancestors said excitedly.

At this time, they were all counting the number of Zuwen.

"Seventy-two Zuwen!"

Ye Tian counted.

That's a lot of money, and the value of such an ancestral relic is very precious!
